verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable answer in sentence 1 more directly: "The fastest reliable path is diffing heap snapshots taken hours apart"; A also starts well with "Heap snapshot diffing is the technique that actually finds it."
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder to one path with "Here's the workflow I'd use, in order" and "This is the money technique," while B adds more fallback options earlier.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives a no-code command path: "node --heapsnapshot-signal=SIGUSR2 your-app.js" then "kill -USR2 <pid>" plus the DevTools diff steps.
